rulings.Case Title: EDDIE STEWART ET AL VS. AUTO PARTS WHOLESALE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 26, 2024, in Department 301, Line 1. Plaintiff's Motion for Order Granting Preference in Setting Case for Trial, and Extending Discovery Cutoff under C.C.P. section 36(a) is CONTINUED. No opposition filed. On the Court's own motion, the matter is continued to December 3, 2024. = (301/RCE)

rulings.Case Title: SUSAN SHER VS. KAISER GYPSUM COMPANY, INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 26, 2024, in Department 301, Line 2. Plaintiff's Motion for Order Granting Preference in Setting Case for Trial, and Extending Discovery Cutoff under C.C.P. section 36(a) is CONTINUED. Conditional Opposition filed by Defendant Mission Stucco Company. Reply filed by Plaintiff. On the Court's own motion, the matter is continued to December 3, 2024. = (301/RCE)
